title: Episode 1
overview: A heavily-injured Su Huan-chen is fleeing on Su Lung Path. Meanwhile, Chi Lu-jen goes up the Tien Nan Mountain to ask Pan To-fei to cast a sword.

title: Episode 2
overview: Inside the Huge Rock, Chi Lu-jen uses ch'i kung to flip the Book. Amidst the Ghost Forest, the Silkworm Palace aims to capture Chin Shao-yeh live.

title: Episode 3
overview: The Blue Crystal Man decides to pour the Blue Crystal Poison into the Jade Pool. On the Tien Nan Mt., Pan To-fei decides to act on behalf of justice.

title: Episode 4
overview: Inside the Thousand Lights Rock, the life of one of the men will most likely end. A father and his son wage a fierce sword fight against each another.

title: Episode 5
overview: After destroying the tomb of Yi Chien Wan Sheng, the Purple Queen finds a secret passage under the coffin. Tan Wu-yu has been planning for a comeback.

title: Episode 6
overview: The Purple Queen states that the person who let the dragon loose has been caught. The Invisible Ice Arrow wants to kill Chi Lu-jen for the Potion.

title: Episode 7
overview: Yeh Hsiao-chai and Yi Chien Wan Sheng are facing off with their swords again. Hua Hsin-feng attempts to seize the Dragon Bone Sacred Sword by force.

title: Episode 8
overview: Holding the Dragon Bone Sacred Sword, Su Huan-chen confronts Hua Hsin-feng. Someone presses Chi Lu-jen to reveal the whereabouts of the Sacred Sword.

title: Episode 9
overview: As Yi Chien Wan Sheng maneuvers the sword to fight, Su Huan-chen makes it clear that he must avenge for Yeh Hsiao-chai for having his feet cut off.

title: Episode 10
overview: An amnesiac Chi Lu-jen travels all the way to Snowfield alone. Just as his body temperature drops and he starts shivering, someone comes up to him.

title: Episode 11
overview: Huo Lung-she stole a paper slip back. Believing that Su Huan-chen did something to the slip, Tai Huang-chun seeks help from Chu Chueh Yun Tan.

title: Episode 12
overview: Su Huan-chen and Kuan Tsu Tien have a fateful duel against each other. Chin Chia-hsien and Yin Shih-jen finally find the whereabouts of Ming Chi-tien.

title: Episode 13
overview: There are two small cups of tea on the table: the cup of life, and the cup of death. Chu Chueh Yun Tan asks Su Huan-chen to put his life on the line.

title: Episode 14
overview: Ming Chi-tien confronts Kuan Tsu-tien to avenge for his family. A mourning Yi Chien Wan Sheng is enraged upon learning his friend's death cause.

title: Episode 15
overview: Tai Huang-chun and Chih Pi-li try to kill Su Huan-chen. Ming Chi-tien hopes to share the burden for Chi Lu-jen, who gives out a certain hint.

title: Episode 16
overview: Tao-shou and Chien-Chin are ordered to kill Chi Lu-jen, and Tao-shou makes a certain finding in the process. Ming Chi-tien finds himself in a dilemma.

title: Episode 17
overview: On the Tien Yu Shan Lin Path, the crowd is puzzled by Teng-tieh's words. Chin Chia-hsien comes to the Pai-chin Palace as requested by Chi Lu-jen.

title: Episode 18
overview: Su Huan-chen speaks out his mind, which is upsetting for Chi Lu-jen to hear. The Cold Sword White Fox arrives for the promised duel.

title: Episode 19
overview: As Yi Yeh Shu and Pan Chih Chien analyze the destinies of Su Huan-chen and Chin Chia-hsien, they have a disagreement for the first time in a century.

title: Episode 20
overview: Yeh Hsiao-chai's life is hanging in the balance. Chiu-fen tells Su Huan-chen that if he wants to obtain the Sacred Sword, he must pass a certain test.
